---
title: "IAT Participant level analysis: main"
author: "Alexander Porshnev"
date: "12/05/2025"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
engine: julia
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=."]
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  info: false
---

<!-- this setup dependencies, but doesn't appear in the generated document -->

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| results: "hidden" 
	using Pkg
	using CairoMakie        
	using DataFrames
	using MixedModels
	using MixedModelsMakie # diagnostic plots
	#using RCall            # call R from Julia if error run set R_HOME='*' in terminal
	using Arrow
	using StandardizedPredictors
	using BoxCox
	using LinearAlgebra
	using StatsAPI
	using StatsBase
	using CSV
	using PrettyTables
```


## Upload Dataset & helper print functions
```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| results: "hidden"
iat = DataFrame(Arrow.Table("../out_step_02/t_2009_top10.arrow"))

function init_html(file_name = "bl_render.html")
	open(file_name, "w") do io
	    show(io, "text/html", html"""<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8" />""")
    end
end

function close_html(file_name = "bl_render.html")
	open(file_name, "a") do io
	    show(io, "text/html", html"""</html>""")
  end
end

function print_html(smth, file_name = "bl_render.html")
   print(smth)
   open(file_name, "a") do io
	    show(io, MIME("text/html"), smth)
	 end
   #pretty_table(smth; backend = :markdown, alignment=:c)
end

function OutTable(df, file_name = "bl_render.html")
  open(file_name, "a") do io
        pretty_table(io, df; backend = :html, alignment=:c)
	end
	pretty_table(df, backend = :html, alignment=:c)
end

function OutModel(m_prec, m_next, file_name = "bl_render.html",  print_lltest= 1)
	print_html(m_next, file_name)
    if print_lltest == 1 
	 	print_html(MixedModels.likelihoodratiotest(m_prec, m_next), file_name)
    end
	
	return 1
end

init_html()
```



#```{julia}
#| echo: false

m00 = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + sex + countryres 
        + Length + NSyll  
	    + Order
        + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end

OutModel(m00,m00,"bl_render.html",0)

m01 = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll
      + Order + change
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end

OutModel(m00, m01)

m02a = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number 
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end

m02 = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number 
	  + after_error 
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
 
m02bnc = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number + after_error 
	  + logBNC
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
OutModel(m02, m02bnc)


m02ukwac = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number + after_error 
	  + logUKWAC
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
OutModel(m02, m02ukwac)

m02bbc = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number + after_error 
	  + logBBC
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
OutModel(m02, m02bbc)
```
## Summary of BICs
#```{julia}
#| echo: false

modelBICs = DataFrame([ (model="m00: ASCLNsO ", bic=bic(m00),delta = "-"),
						(model="m01: m00+change", bic=bic(m01),delta =bic(m00)-bic(m01)),
						(model="m02a: m01+trial_number", bic=bic(m02a),delta =bic(m01)-bic(m02a)),
						(model="m02:m02a+after_error", bic=bic(m02),delta =bic(m02a)-bic(m02)),
						(model="m02+logBNC", bic=bic(m02bnc),delta =bic(m02)-bic(m02bnc)),
						(model="m02+logUKWAC", bic=bic(m02ukwac),delta =bic(m02)-bic(m02ukwac)),
						(model="m02+logBBC", bic=bic(m02bbc),delta =bic(m02)-bic(m02bbc)) ])
OutTable(modelBICs)


```

```{julia}
df1 = select(iat,[:"RT",:"trial_number",:"cos_llama_65b_Q5_0_pairs_names_Upper"])
OutTable(cor(Matrix(df1)))

```

```{julia}
close_html()
```
